title: Add buildah export support
body:
Will export the contents of a container as a tar ball.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Need to add tests, but other then that this seems to work.
I think you missed a merge on buildah.md.  The code changes look ok to me, don't know what's what with the test though.

Added tests, I think this is ready for merge/review.

@nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat @14rcole @umohnani8 PTAL
Assuming happy tests, LGTM for merging.
We're probably going to overlap some with kpod here, but should we be able to export non-buildah containers as well?
Well as soon as this is approved we want kpod export, so they should be the same.

I think ideally we'd handle the `--output` argument in one place rather than two -- the terminal check can currently be bypassed by passing `/dev/tty` as a value, which is probably not the intention.
I still don't like duplicating the description of the only implemented option in the description section of the `--help` output and the man page, where they're immediately followed by the section that describes the available options, but if you've got a good reason for that, I'll let that go.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/a49a32f55fe977439aebba1cc1d383d6624bc94e.1498680951106660352/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing a49a32f55fe977439aebba1cc1d383d6624bc94e to master...
